PDF_Summary: This document is a Narcotics Division Seizure Report from the HPD, detailing a controlled substance seizure on February 20, 2024, at 6700 Harrisburg Blvd in Houston. Led by Det. Carlos Rivera, officers seized significant quantities of methamphetamine, cocaine, US currency, and firearms. Two suspects, Miguel Hernandez and Tony Nguyen, were arrested and charged with possession with intent to distribute, and the case has been forwarded to the DA.

PDF_Summary: This document is a Fire Investigation Report detailing a structure fire at 1200 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX, on February 3, 2024. The incident, investigated by Lt. David Park, was classified as accidental, caused by an electrical malfunction in an overloaded power strip, resulting in one injury and an estimated $450,000 in damages.

PDF_Summary: This document is an incident report from the Houston Police Department detailing an armed robbery at the QuickStop convenience store on January 15, 2024. A male suspect, described as approximately 5'10" and wearing a black hoodie, brandished a silver handgun and fled with $847.00 in cash after demanding it from clerk Mr. James Chen. No injuries were reported, and the case, with collected evidence including surveillance footage and fingerprints, is currently under investigation.
